subcodes.first_line: O ye two luminaries of the love of God! Your letter hath arrived. Praise be unto God, ye are quickened by the spirit of the love of God and by His breath [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو شمع محبه الله نامه شماها رسید الحمد لله بروح محبه الله زنده اید و بنفحه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
